title: final_output

status.description: The terminal state of the pipeline run. 'blocked' covers both conflict-blocked and clarification-blocked cases.

cleaned_prompt.description: Present when status is 'ready' and mode is QuickClean or StrictClean.

target_style_output.description: Present when status is 'ready' and mode is TargetLLMStyle. Replaces cleaned_prompt.

diff.description: Present when status is 'ready' and the prompt was modified.

diagnosis.description: Present when status is 'blocked'. Explains what is missing or conflicting.

clarification_request.description: Present when status is 'blocked' due to a missing required field.

upgrade_recommendation.description: Optional. Present when complexity is medium and the prompt may grow into a workflow.

x-hard_rules: cleaned_prompt and target_style_output are mutually exclusive — exactly one must be present when status is 'ready'
cleaned_prompt must not be present when status is 'blocked' or 'escalated'
escalation_notice must not be present when status is 'ready' or 'blocked'
diff must be present when status is 'ready' and output differs from raw input
clarification = blocked state with clarification_request present; there is no separate 'clarification' status
